source_record_details.conditions: Other species also deliberately inoculated (but only one organism counted here), Cut (minced, chopped, ground, etc), Inoculation in/on previously heated (cooked, baked, pasteurized, etc) but not sterilised food/medium, Vacuum-packed
source_record_details.citation: Bredholt (et al.), 1999, Protective cultures inhibit growth of Listeria monocytogenes and Escherichia coli O157:H7 in cooked, sliced, vacuum- and gas-packaged meat, int. J. Food Microbiol., 53, 43-52.

construction_notes: elicited_inputs derived from ComBase record_id 344 (Pork / Ham). N0 = log_cfu at lowest step. past/future_temperature_segments are an approximate human-readable split of the curve's duration (constant temperature); ground_truth_curve.values is the actual gridded trajectory. Some grid steps may be linearly interpolated between real lab readings rather than directly measured -- this is expected given sparse irregular sampling gridded onto fixed 15.15h intervals, not a data quality issue. Not a generalization claim -- used to sanity-check the elicit -> infer -> verdict pipeline end to end.
